---
title: "universal.py"
path: "C:/Users/Craig/Corvus/CorvusStar/src/core/engine/gungnir/universal.py"
loc: 109
complexity: 17
logic_score: 1.35
style_score: 1.00
intel_score: 3.60
overall_score: 1.48
---

## Intent
Python module facilitating UniversalGungnir, audit. It exists to support broader Python integration routines. Its role in the system is to provide foundational utilities for script execution.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 1.3/10
- **Style [S]**: 1.0/10
- **Intel [I]**: 3.6/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 23 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [ast](file://ast)
- [re](file://re)
- [typing](file://typing)

### Exports
- `UniversalGungnir`
- `audit`
- `audit_logic`
- `_audit_logic_rules`
- `_audit_style_rules`
- `_audit_data_rules`
- `_audit_structure_rules`
